response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is primarily in full-stack web and mobile development, with minimal evidence of hardware-software co-design or performance modeling for AI accelerators, despite some low-level DLang and C++ exposure.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical teaching ability
Proven track record in performance-critical systems (e.g., low-latency DLang apps)
concerns: No evidence of SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling experience
Lacks demonstrated expertise in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware-focused experience
